title: Fix dynamic triggers for named events
body:
Before this patch, `DynamicTriggerScheduler`'s `evaluate()` function returned
true iff the 'triggered' queue contained any coroutines. However, if a given
trigger requires any post updates, as is the case with named events, its
coroutine is added to the 'post update' queue first. So even if such an event
was triggered, it would not make `evaluate()` return true. This led to delayed
resumption of such coroutines.

This patch addresses that issue by introducing a boolean value that is
explicitly set to true if a dynamic trigger is set. `evaluate()` simply returns
that boolean, which results in correct resumption of any coroutines waiting on
dynamic triggers.
